hook: Being trustworthy early means being legible, not being perfect.
body: People do not need flawless execution from you; they need signals they can interpret without strain.

hook: Some men think trust comes from saying all the right things while acting inconsistently underneath them.
body: Legibility matters more than polish. Calm follow-through beats impressive talk.

hook: Legibility matters more than polish. Calm follow-through beats impressive talk.
body: If you say you will reach out after a trip and then actually do, that simple congruence builds trust fast.

body: Make fewer promises and follow through on the ones you make.
